heading: Disposition of property of International Pacific Salmon Fisheries Commission
label: 3642 Disposition of property of International Pacific Salmon Fisheries Commission
text: The Secretary of State shall dispose of any United States property held by the International Pacific Salmon Fisheries Commission on the date of its termination in a manner which would further the purposes of this chapter.
notes: CodificationSection consists of a part of .
